home.heroSubtitle: Step into a smoky 80s detective agency, question suspects with SQL queries, and crack the case one statement at a time.
home.welcomeMessage: The city is buzzing. New evidence just landed on your desk.
home.featureQueryDrivenDesc: Every clue is hidden in a database. Use SQL to interrogate the data and expose the culprit.
home.featureNoSetupDesc: Built-in SQL workspace powered by SQL.js. Just open a case and start digging.
home.featureEarnXPDesc: Solve cases to level up your badge and unlock tougher investigations.
home.howItWorksP1: Each case drops you into a story-driven investigation. You read the brief, study the database schema, and run SQL queries in a built-in editor to surface clues. As you connect tables, eliminate suspects, and validate alibis, you practice real SQL patterns: filtering, joins, aggregates, and subqueries. No setup or installs. Just open a case file and start interrogating the data.
home.howItWorksP2: Progression is tracked with XP and difficulty tiers, so you can start as a rookie and grow into a seasoned investigator. Beginner cases teach fundamentals, while advanced cases push you with layered joins and trickier conditions.
home.howItWorksP3: Ready to see it in action?
home.audienceDevelopers: Developers wanting a hands-on, story-first way to practice SQL fundamentals and joins.
home.audienceAnalysts: Data analysts preparing for interviews who need realistic querying scenarios.
home.audienceStudents: Students who learn faster through narrative and immediate feedback instead of dry textbooks.
home.audienceInstructors: Instructors looking for engaging SQL exercises without any environment setup for learners.
home.faqSubtitle: Quick answers before you start your first case.
home.faqAccountQ: Do I need an account to play?
home.faqAccountA: You can open and solve cases without creating an account. Sign in to track XP, progress, and solved cases across devices.
home.faqAccessA: Intermediate and advanced cases require XP to unlock, so pick a starting case and build momentum from there.
home.faqSqlQ: What SQL do I need to know?
home.faqSqlA: Beginners can start with simple SELECTs. Intermediate and advanced cases introduce joins, grouping, filters, and subqueries as you progress.
home.faqInterviewA: Yes. Cases mimic realistic data puzzles you might see in data and engineering interviews. It's great for practicing under a narrative without rote question banks.
home.faqHintsQ: Can I get hints if I'm stuck?
home.faqHintsA: Each case includes a schema view and objectives. If you need more help, join the community Discord or check the help page for guidance.

cases.beginnerDesc: Perfect for SQL newcomers. Learn the basics of querying and data analysis.
cases.intermediateDesc: For investigators with basic SQL knowledge. Tackle more complex queries and optimizations.
cases.advancedDesc: Expert-level cases requiring deep SQL knowledge and problem-solving skills.

caseStudy.noResults: No results yet. Execute a query to see the results.
caseStudy.schemaTip: Tip: You can drag and reposition tables to organize the schema view
caseStudy.noTablesFound: No tables found in the database.

solution.saveXpNote: Note: Create an account to save your XP rewards for solved cases.
solution.shareMessage: Share SQLNoir with another detective and see if they can solve it too.
solution.tryAgainMessage: Try again with a different answer.
solution.submitDescription: Submit the suspect you discovered through your investigation to see if you cracked the case.
solution.answerHint: Enter the specific name you found through your investigation.
solution.progressError: An error occurred while updating progress

hints.title: Investigation Tips
hints.checkNullDesc: Use IS NULL to find records with missing information in critical fields.
hints.joinTablesDesc: Connect orders with customer information using JOIN operations.
hints.filterDateDesc: Use BETWEEN operator to find orders within specific dates.

notes.title: Investigation Notes
notes.placeholder: Take notes about your investigation here...
notes.autoSaveMessage: Your notes are automatically saved locally and will persist between sessions.

share.title: Solve crimes together!
share.shareTitle: SQL Noir - Learn SQL by solving crimes

help.title: Hit a dead end on a case?
help.subtitle: Every detective needs a network. Got a lead to share or need assistance cracking a tough case?
help.discordDesc: Join the community, swap query tips, or ask for a nudge on a tricky clue.
help.githubDesc: Found a bug or want to propose a feature? Open an issue and we'll investigate.
help.faqClueA: Check the Schema tab first, then drop by Discord for a nudge.
help.faqBugQ: Found a bug in the code?
help.faqBugA: Found a bug or glitch? Report it on GitHub and we'll investigate.
help.faqContributeA: Pull requests welcome. Grab an open issue or pitch us a new case idea.
